gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6900 XT (SIENNA_CICHLID, DRM 3.42.0, 5.15.15-76051515-generic, LLVM 12.0.1)
notes: As said above, there are issues on the Steam Deck with the Linux Native version. Switching to Proton version with Proton-GE 8.4 worked flawlessly without further tinkering and resolved the issue. Other proton versions official or unofficial not tested but I assume they work too.
